quiz.title: Grade 5 Reading – Advanced Comprehension
quiz.subject: Reading
quiz.description: Read longer passages and answer questions about inference, author's purpose, and summarizing.

questions.question: Passage: The invention of the telephone changed how people talked over long distances. Before it, messages took days by mail. Alexander Graham Bell's idea helped connect families and friends faster. What was the author's main purpose?
options: To explain how phones are made

questions.question: Passage: In the story, the boy ignored the warning signs and went near the cliff. He slipped but grabbed a branch just in time. What can you infer about the boy?
Passage: Renewable energy like solar and wind is better for the planet than coal because it does not pollute the air. Many countries are switching to clean energy. Summarize the main idea.
Passage: The character felt nervous before the big game but scored the winning goal. How did the character's feelings change?
Passage: Compare the two animals: Whales live in the ocean and breathe air, while fish use gills. Both swim but in different ways. What is one difference?
Passage: The author describes the rainforest as full of colorful birds and tall trees but also warns about deforestation. Why does the author include the warning?
options: To explain why we should protect it
questions.correct_answer: To explain why we should protect it

questions.question: Passage: After the storm, the town worked together to clean up. Neighbors helped each other rebuild. What is the theme?
Passage: The explorer faced many dangers but kept a journal of discoveries. The journal helped scientists later. What was the purpose of the journal?
Passage: Photosynthesis is how plants make food using sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide. Animals cannot do this. Why can't animals make their own food?
Passage: The story shows two friends arguing over a game but then apologizing and playing again. What lesson does the author teach?
options: Friendship is more important than winning
questions.correct_answer: Friendship is more important than winning
